---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, a new rule, or an improvement to an existing skill
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## Type of request

- [ ] Improve an existing skill
- [ ] Add a new rule
- [ ] Add support for a new language
- [ ] Create a new skill
- [ ] Improve docs or installation

## Related skill

- [ ] `front-comments`
- [ ] `front-a11y`
- [ ] `front-review`
- [ ] `front-refactor`
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Documentation

## Problem to solve

What workflow, limitation, or pain point does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior, command, or rule you would like to see.

## Example input or output

Add an example if it helps clarify the request.

```txt

```

## Additional context

Links, references, comparable tools, or screenshots.
